FGO-BASE_NP_PER_COST.title: NP Gain per Cost
FGO-BASE_NP_PER_COST.hover.desc: How much Noble Phantasm Gauge you gain for each point of energy spent on non-NP cards.
FGO-ENABLE_COLORLESS_CARDS.title: Enable Colorless Cards (Requires game restart)
FGO-ENABLE_COLORLESS_CARDS.hover.desc: Adds colorless cards to the card pool. Requires a game restart to take effect.
FGO-ENABLE_PADORU.title: Enable Christmas Easter Egg
FGO-ENABLE_FTUE.title: Enable Ftue
FGO-ENABLE_FTUE.hover.desc: Enables the first-time user experience tutorial.
FGO-ENABLE_NO_COST_NOBLE_PHANTASM.title: Enable No Cost Noble Phantasm (Requires game restart)
Makes Noble Phantasm cards cost 0 energy. Requires a game restart to take effect.
FGO-ENEMIES.title: Enemies
FGO-ENABLE_ENEMIES.title: Enable Enemies (Requires game restart)
FGO-ENABLE_ENEMIES.hover.desc: Master toggle for all FGO enemy encounters. Requires a game restart to take effect.
FGO-ENABLE_EMIYA.title: Emiya
FGO-ENABLE_EMIYA.hover.desc: Enable Emiya as an enemy encounter. Requires 'Enable Enemies' to be on.
FGO-ENABLE_CALAMITY_OF_NORWICH.title: Calamity of Norwich
FGO-ENABLE_CALAMITY_OF_NORWICH.hover.des: Enable Calamity of Norwich as an enemy encounter. Requires 'Enable Enemies' to be on.
FGO-ENABLE_CERNUNNOS.title: Cernunnos
FGO-ENABLE_CERNUNNOS.hover.desc: Enable Cernunnos as an enemy encounter. Requires 'Enable Enemies' to be on.
FGO-ENABLE_FAERIE_KNIGHT_GAWAIN.title: Faerie Knight Gawain
FGO-ENABLE_FAERIE_KNIGHT_GAWAIN.hover.de: Enable Faerie Knight Gawain as an enemy encounter. Requires 'Enable Enemies' to be on.
FGO-ENABLE_FAERIE_KNIGHT_LANCELOT.title: Faerie Knight Lancelot
Enable Faerie Knight Lancelot as an enemy encounter. Requires 'Enable Enemies' to be on.
FGO-ENABLE_MOSS.title: Moss
FGO-ENABLE_MOSS.hover.desc: Enable Moss as an enemy encounter. Requires 'Enable Enemies' to be on.
FGO-ENABLE_QUEEN_MORGAN.title: Queen Morgan
FGO-ENABLE_QUEEN_MORGAN.hover.desc: Enable Queen Morgan as an enemy encounter. Requires 'Enable Enemies' to be on.
